package seed

import (
	"log"

	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

// Positive scenario for placeholder_seed_function_in_production.
// Rule intent: Seed entrypoints in production code that are still TODO-shaped or effectively no-ops.
// Anti-pattern: Seed function in production package with TODO comment and no real implementation.

type Category struct {
	ID   uint   `gorm:"primaryKey"`
	Name string `gorm:"column:name"`
}

type Role struct {
	ID   uint   `gorm:"primaryKey"`
	Name string `gorm:"column:name"`
}

func SeedData(db *gorm.DB) error {
	// TODO: implement seed data for production
	// Need to add default categories and roles before launch
	log.Println("SeedData called but not yet implemented")
	return nil
}

func SeedCategories(db *gorm.DB) error {
	// TODO: add categories
	return nil
}

func SeedRoles(db *gorm.DB) error {
	// TODO: add roles
	return nil
}
